title: loxotrema lusitanica
intro: Loxotrema lusitanica, also known as "Loxotrema", is a species of flowering plant in the family Ebenaceae. It is native to Portugal and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Loxotrema lusitanica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
